_comment:
Shipped preset for Flux Fill Inpaint. Template ships as a subgraph; after browser-side graphToPrompt expansion, inner nodes get IDs of the form '<subgraph_instance_id>:<inner_id>' — see executionUtil.ts:110. So the inner KSampler (#3) becomes '47:3' in api_json, etc.

We also added a top-level LoadImageMask (#100) so our painter-driven mask_data flow works: original template uses LoadImage's alpha channel as the mask, but ComfyTV's InpaintStage sends mask data separately as option:mask_data.
label: Flux Fill Inpaint
description: Inpaint via Flux Fill Dev (fp8). Upstream image → LoadImage; painter mask → LoadImageMask; main_prompt → inner CLIPTextEncode. Both image and mask are required. Output is a single image (COMFYTV_IMAGE).

image.error: Inpaint needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.
Inpaint needs a mask — paint the area you want to change before running.

text.default: high-quality photograph, natural lighting, sharp focus, detailed
